concept: Disagree / To Offer a Personal, Considered View
description: The tempered act of offering a different perspective. It is not an act of opposition, but a contribution to a fuller understanding of the whole, based on one's own mindful consideration.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'mi' (inner self), 'the' (deliberate consideration), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'to make one's own deliberate consideration open.' This reframes disagreement as a vulnerable, thoughtful offering, removing any sense of confrontation from the word itself.
